mapper.insert: INSERT INTO execution_traces ( correlation_id, user_id, session_id, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, status, steps_count, tool_calls, error_message, input_tokens, output_tokens, trace_payload, pattern_analyzed ) VALUES ( #{correlationId}, #{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{durationMs}, #{status}, #{stepsCount}, #{toolCalls}, #{errorMessage}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{tracePayload}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, correlation_id AS correlationId, user_id AS userId, session_id AS sessionId, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt, duration_ms AS durationMs, status, steps_count AS stepsCount, tool_calls AS toolCalls, error_message AS errorMessage, input_tokens AS inputTokens, output_tokens AS outputTokens, trace_payload AS tracePayload, pattern_analyzed AS patternAnalyzed, created_at AS createdAt FROM execution_traces WHERE correlation_id = #{correlationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, correlation_id AS correlationId, user_id AS userId, session_id AS sessionId, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt, duration_ms AS durationMs, status, steps_count AS stepsCount, tool_calls AS toolCalls, error_message AS errorMessage, input_tokens AS inputTokens, output_tokens AS outputTokens, trace_payload AS tracePayload, pattern_analyzed AS patternAnalyzed, created_at AS createdAt FROM execution_traces WHERE status = #{status} AND pattern_analyzed = 0 ORDER BY started_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update:
UPDATE execution_traces SET pattern_analyzed = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT AVG(duration_ms) FROM execution_traces WHERE started_at >= #{since} AND duration_ms IS NOT NULL
SELECT DATE(started_at) AS day, SUM(input_tokens) AS inputTokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS outputTokens FROM execution_traces WHERE started_at >= #{since} GROUP BY DATE(started_at) ORDER BY day ASC

SELECT DATE(started_at) AS day, SUM(input_tokens) AS inputTokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS outputTokens FROM execution_traces WHERE started_at >= #{from} AND started_at < #{to} GROUP BY DATE(started_at) ORDER BY day ASC

SELECT DATE(started_at) AS day, COUNT(1) AS totalExecutions, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount FROM execution_traces WHERE started_at >= #{from} AND started_at < #{to} GROUP BY DATE(started_at) ORDER BY day ASC
